questions.q: Two U.S. Navy destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz in May 2026 after dodging a sustained barrage of missiles, drones, and small boats from which country?
Which domestically produced Ukrainian cruise missile reportedly struck a Russian military-industrial site in Cheboksary in early May 2026?
Which nation announced it would unilaterally observe a 'regime of silence' ceasefire starting at midnight on May 5–6, 2026?
Days before the annual Victory Day parade in 2026, a Ukrainian drone reportedly hit a luxury high-rise residential building located just miles from the Kremlin in which city?
In May 2026, which Middle Eastern nation reported coming under Iranian attack for the first time since an April ceasefire, as the U.S. moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz?
